text.title: Pixel Installation and Event Tracking Code
text.summary: Meta Pixel and Google Ads tag installation snippets with standard event JavaScript calls.

section.title: Meta Pixel Base Code
section.reference: Meta Pixel base code with PageView

rule.statement: Install the Meta Pixel base code on every page of the site, not just conversion pages.
rule.rationale: The base code enables audience building from all page visitors, not just converters — required for website custom audiences and retargeting.

example.note: transaction_id deduplicates conversions if the thank-you page fires twice — always include it for purchase events.
